faq.description: Do you have any questions? We have got you covered.
faq.title: Frequently asked questions

refundPolicy.question: What is the refund policy?
refundPolicy.answer: We offer a 30-day money-back guarantee if you're not happy with our product.

cancelSubscription.question: How do I cancel my subscription?
cancelSubscription.answer: You can cancel your subscription by visiting the billing page.

changePlan.question: Can I change my plan?
changePlan.answer: Yes, you can change your plan at any time by visiting the billing page.

freeTrial.question: Do you offer a free trial?
freeTrial.answer: Not at this stage. But speak with your financial advisor to find out how you can get early access to our product and be among the first to try it out.

hero.featureBadge: Integrating genetic risk into sophisticated financial planning
hero.title: Your genetic profile is unique. Your financial plan should be too.
hero.subtitle: Your DNA offers clues about longevity, resilience, and risk. BioAnalytix turns those clues into actionable insights, helping you build a financial plan that reflects your real future - not a generic one.
hero.builtWith: Built & shipped with these awesome tools

features.title: Turn genetic insights into smarter financial decisions
features.description: Traditional financial planning is built on averages: average life expectancy, average health outcomes, and generic risk profiles.

feature1.title: Precision planning
feature1.subtitle: Planning that reflects your unique genetic makeup.
feature1.description: Genetic analysis can identify predispositions to certain health conditions, longevity indicators, and inherited risk factors.

benefit1.title: Replace assumptions with personalised risk insight
benefit1.description: Obtain a more accuracte assessment of long-term needs and reduce reliance on broad actuarial averages.

benefit2.title: Optimise insurance strategies
benefit2.description: Genetic insights can help tailor insurance coverage to your specific risk profile.

benefit3.title: Informed wealth accumulation
benefit3.description: Genetic insights allow for realistic planning scenarios, not to predict outcomes but to stress test financial strategies.

feature2.title: Enhance estate and legacy planning
feature2.subtitle: A legacy shaped by insight, not uncertainty.
feature2.description: Genetic assessment introduces personalised insights to move beyond assumptions.

benefit1.title: Informed longevity expectations
benefit1.description: Genetic indicators help clarify potential lifespan ranges, allowing you to structure inheritances, trusts, and asset transfers with greater precision rather than relying on generic assumptions.

benefit2.title: Strategic timing of wealth transfer
benefit2.description: Understanding predispositions that may influence health or capacity enables more intentional decisions about when and how to pass on assets, ensuring your legacy is protected and optimally timed.

benefit3.title: Confidence in multi‑generational planning
benefit3.description: Personalised genetic insights support clearer long‑term forecasting, helping families prepare for future needs, safeguard beneficiaries, and preserve wealth across generations.
